title: DaiChangCraft
description: A Minecraft adventure mod that adds many props and several entities to the game.
body:
# DCCraft

DCCraft is a Minecraft Forge mod that adds a variety of new features and content to the game.

## Features

### Custom Entities
- **Seraphina**: A powerful boss entity with complex AI and multiple attack patterns
- **DCSteve**: A custom Steve entity with special abilities
- Various custom project entities (arrows, projectiles, etc.)

### Custom Items
- **Forever Oath Sword**: A powerful weapon with unique effects
- **Mace**: A melee weapon that deals area-of-effect damage
- **Hexahedron** and **Regular Dodecahedron**: Special tools
- **Music Player**: Built-in music playback functionality supporting NetEase Cloud Music

### Custom Blocks
- **BedRockGlass**: A special glass block
- **DCCraftingTable**: An enhanced crafting table

### Client-Side Features
- **Dynamic Island HUD**: A dynamic notification system similar to iPhone
- **Module System**: Enable or disable various client-side features
- **Music Player**: Play music directly within the game
- **Notification System**: Visually appealing notifications
- **Target HUD**: Displays information about targeted entities

### Other Features
- Custom dimension: "Horizon of Existence"
- Multiple custom enchantments
- Custom potion effects
- Advanced rendering effects and shaders

## Installation

1. Ensure the correct version of Minecraft Forge is installed
2. Place the DCCraft-RE mod file into the mods folder
3. Launch the game

## Usage

### Music Player
- Press the designated key to open the music player interface
- Search and play music from NetEase Cloud Music
- Supports account login

### Module System
- Press the designated key to open the module management interface
- Enable or disable various feature modules
- Each module may have independent settings

### Dynamic Island HUD
- Automatically displays when important events occur
- Shows notifications for module enable/disable actions
- Displays system announcements

## Configuration

The mod provides several configuration options; relevant configuration files can be found and modified in the config folder.

## Dependencies

- GeckoLib 1.20.1
- Minecraft Forge (specific version)

## Developer Information

This project is maintained by daichangs_mc, with source code hosted on Gitee.

## License

Please refer to the LICENSE file in the project for detailed licensing information.
